audit_items.proof_trace: The property holds. Dangling pointers exist (server.repl_transfer_tmpfile is freed in replicationAbortSyncTransfer/L1927 and readSyncBulkPayload/L1291 without being NULL'd), but they are inaccessible: the socket fd event handler is deleted by undoConnectWithMaster() before the free, state machine moves to REPL_STATE_CONNECT where no code path can reach tmpfile until syncWithMaster() overwrites it at L1865. All other freed pointers (repl_backlog, cached_master, server.master, replpreamble) are NULL'd immediately after free. The freeClientAsync double-call scenario in replicationResurrectCachedMaster is prevented by the CLIENT_CLOSE_ASAP guard (networking.c:1044). List iterations that call freeClient only free the list node, not the pointed-to client struct, so post-deletion slave dereferences are safe.
